canonical_yaml:
claim: Claude integration surface ships more than 8 artifacts (skills + subagents + slash commands)
experiment:
  command: python3 claims/self/claude_surface/metric.py
  dataset: .claude
  metric_fn: claims.self.claude_surface.metric:count_claude_artifacts
falsification:
  failure_criteria:
  - direction: above
    metric: claude_artifacts
    threshold: 8
  minimum_sample_size: 1
  stopping_rule: fixed-n one walk of .claude/
